description: Fit Kaplan-Meier survival curves comparing groups, with log-rank test, Cox proportional-hazards hazard ratio + 95% CI, a number-at-risk table, a statistics summary, and a LaTeX outcome table.
rules: read-only — reads one survival CSV (patient_id,time,event,group), writes only under record_store
requires lifelines + matplotlib at run time; absent lifelines the porter records the gap and writes an empty report
primary output is survival_statistics.txt (PDF/PNG curves, number-at-risk CSV, and LaTeX table accompany it when lifelines is present)
usage: Set INPUT_CSV (CSV with patient_id,time,event,group) and optionally TITLE. Output: survival_statistics.txt.
limitation: Hazard-ratio path assumes 2 groups. Needs lifelines (not bundled); without it the report is an empty placeholder. Curve rendering needs matplotlib.
